name: TalkForrestTorgen
_source: s;Torgen;Forrest! I had a feeling I'd see you.|Why's the whole Medean army out here? Does it gotta do with Krista?|And what happened to her?{br}She's alright, right?|{c:e;Torgen;CloseEyes}If Gordon did anything to her, I'd--
s;Forrest;No need to fret, Torgen. She's safe and sound. Has been all this time.
s;Torgen;Yeah?! Thank Oreg.|I can always depend on you to be her knight in shining armor, huh?

s;Forrest;Ahem! Th-That aside{tgm}...|{c:e;Forrest;NormalBlink}{tgm}To answer your previous question, we're heading to Orobas to overthrow the Council.|Speaking of which, have you noticed any strange happenings in Oregot as of late?
s;Torgen;Yeah, actually.|You didn't hear this from me,|but some buyin' and sellin' has been going on between bandits and the Council.|We send them people, they give us coin.
s;Forrest;Yes, this lines up with what has occurred in the rest of Yondo.|{c:e;Forrest;NormalBlink}And now that I think of it,|that also explains why Gordon did what he did months ago.

s;Torgen;It was connected all along, huh? Makes sense, looking back.|{c:e;Torgen;NormalBlink}Well, I've had it!|I may do my fair share of raidin' and pillagin', but I've got standards!|{c:e;Torgen;Smile}I'm on your guys' side now!{br}No strings attached!
for;torgenteam;[u for u in game.level.unit_groups.get('torgen').units if game.check_alive(u) == True]
